metadata.description: Medical research methodology framework with 20 skills, 42 reporting standards, 234 journal templates, 6-gate verification, selective constraints

plugins.name: med-research-powers
plugins.description: From hypothesis to publication — an AI-enforced research methodology framework. 20 skills with type routers (clinical/basic/AI-ML/qualitative/survey study design + 6 article types), 234 journal templates, selective constraints with 4 hard checkpoints, PubMed MCP integration, and one-click .docx export.
